title: Message/set update returns notFound for unauthorized mutation instead of forbidden
description: message_set update handler checks sender_id == my_pub_id and returns {type: notFound} when they differ (lines ~1897-1903 of jmap.rs); RFC 8620 §7.1 requires {type: forbidden} for authorization failures — notFound confirms to the caller that the message ID exists and was found in the store, leaking information and violating the spec
